name: ghl-workflow-toolkit
description: GoHighLevel automation toolkit for Claude Code — bundles the BusyBee3333 MCP server (patched for correct workflow chaining), canonical workflow action schemas, API quirks reference, and Firebase auth setup. Works with any GHL account.
author: Luis Morales <handel.development.team@gmail.com>

userConfig.label: Sub-account PIT token (Private Integration Token)
userConfig.description: From GHL → Settings → Private Integrations → Create New (all scopes).

userConfig.label: Sub-account Location ID
userConfig.description: Visible in the URL when you are inside the sub-account.

userConfig.label: Firebase API key
userConfig.description: Captured from the IndexedDB snippet (DevTools console).

userConfig.label: Firebase refresh token
userConfig.description: Captured from the IndexedDB snippet (lasts weeks; re-capture if it expires).

userConfig.label: Agency PIT token (optional)
userConfig.description: Only needed if you will operate at the agency level (push snapshots, create sub-accounts, list locations).
